sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62703" key="leukopa/rufos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λευκο-πάρῠφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n62703.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with white-edged robe</tr_>, Alexander Magnusap.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.180e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
